mapper.sql: ID, PERMISSION_CODE, PERMISSION_NAME, DESCRIPTION, STATUS, RESOURCE_TYPE, RESOURCE, HTTP_METHOD, ACTION, PERMISSION_GROUP, SORT_ORDER, UI_MENU_KEY, UI_ROUTE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT, DELETED_AT
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM M_PERMISSION WHERE ID = #{id} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL

SELECT
FROM M_PERMISSION WHERE PERMISSION_CODE = #{permissionCode} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO M_PERMISSION ( PERMISSION_CODE, PERMISSION_NAME, DESCRIPTION, STATUS, RESOURCE_TYPE, RESOURCE, HTTP_METHOD, ACTION, PERMISSION_GROUP, SORT_ORDER, UI_MENU_KEY, UI_ROUTE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{permissionCode}, #{permissionName}, #{description}, #{status}, #{resourceType}, #{resource}, #{httpMethod}, #{action}, #{permissionGroup}, #{sortOrder}, #{uiMenuKey}, #{uiRoute}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE M_PERMISSION SET PERMISSION_CODE = #{permissionCode}, PERMISSION_NAME = #{permissionName}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, STATUS = #{status}, RESOURCE_TYPE = #{resourceType}, RESOURCE = #{resource}, HTTP_METHOD = #{httpMethod}, ACTION = #{action}, PERMISSION_GROUP = #{permissionGroup}, SORT_ORDER = #{sortOrder}, UI_MENU_KEY = #{uiMenuKey}, UI_ROUTE = #{uiRoute}, UPDATED_AT = #{updatedAt} WHERE ID = #{id} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
